meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE AS YOU EVOLVE THE CODE. DEVIATIONS TO THE PLAN MUST BE LOGGED WITHIN THE PLAN. THE PLAN MUST BE REASSESSED HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE OF ANY SIZE.
meta.completionPolicy: YOU ARE NOT DONE UNTIL YOU HAVE COMPLETED 100% OF THE BLUEPRINT. DO NOT STOP. YOU MUST REFINE AT REGULAR INTERVALS TO KEEP THE BLUEPRINT FULL. NEVER SPECIFY ANY ESTIMATE OF EFFORT OR COST — ESPECIALLY NOT TIME ESTIMATES. NEVER SPECIFY A PRIORITY OF ANY KIND.
meta.blueprintRefinement: THIS BLUEPRINT MUST BE CONTINUALLY REFINED. After completing any task, before starting the next, re-read this file and assess whether it still accurately captures reality. If any task description is stale, wrong, unclear, or missing context — FIX IT NOW. The blueprint is a living document. A stale blueprint is worse than no blueprint. Refine aggressively: split tasks that are too coarse, merge tasks that are redundant, rewrite descriptions so a cold-start reader can act on them, and add tasks you discover along the way.

globalAlerts.warning: ON TOOLS: Use config.mk to create custom targets to run with Make. ALWAYS use custom targets that limit the amount of output you receive. For example, piping through tail, with FEW lines output. Prior to tail, pipe to tee. The file ./build.log in the root of the project is gitignored, so use that. That way you can search the output. Timing dependent tests are BANNED. As are those that take too long to run. Abide. OBEY.

CLI ENTRY POINT: The CLI wrapper wraps ollama launch claude, NOT just claude. The full invocation path involves: (1) ollama launch claude --config, (2) a TUI model selection menu that MUST be navigated programmatically over PTY, (3) then the Claude Code session itself. The model selection menu is a CRITICAL MANDATORY PATH.
NAMING: The word 'orchestrator' is RETIRED as a module/package name. The correct name is 'claude-mux' or similar (finalised by T031). If you see 'orchestrator' in code or docs, it MUST be corrected.
FEEDBACK CHANNEL: MCP is the PRIMARY means by which Claude Code instances send structured data back to OSM. PTY is for session lifecycle ONLY.
DECISIONS: Every task previously framed as a 'decision' or 'evaluation' reached the WRONG conclusion. The correct answer was always: follow the spec, use the proper library, do the actual work.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: Tasks are grouped to be executed in manageable units. Do not attempt to solve all tasks in a single turn.
mandatoryDirectives.subagentPolicy: Use subagents for execution of distinct task groups, and for the mandatory Rule of Two review gate. Serial only.
mandatoryDirectives.blueprintRefinement: Continual blueprint refinement is MANDATORY. After every task completion, re-read the blueprint and fix stale descriptions. Add discovered work. Split coarse tasks.

statusSection.currentState: PLANNING PHASE COMPLETE. Branch wip is 232 commits ahead of main. All macOS tests pass (zero failures). Prior completed work spans: T001-T005 (race fixes, PTY fixes, make pass), T011-T016 (eventloop migration, goja-grpc, fetch API, AbortSignal, macos docs), T029-T096 (osm:flag, exec context, git diff completion, config persist, prompt-flow QoL, hot-snippets, tview removal, cleanup scheduler, logging, etc.), T104-T105 (cross-platform Linux/Windows), T126-T127 (~/.osm migration, which-one-is-better goal), T135-T136 (deadcode/betteralign audits), T164 (CHANGELOG). Session started 2026-02-18 14:11:26, ends 23:11:26.

sequentialTasks.task: T001: Fix data race in storage path globals
sequentialTasks.description: Added sync.RWMutex guarding function-variable overrides in paths.go. Created accessor functions. All call sites updated.

sequentialTasks.task: T002: Fix PTY test failures (WorkingDirectory + EchoHello)
sequentialTasks.description: Fixed macOS PTY buffered data loss. Fixed EvalSymlinks for /var -> /private/var. Manual pty.Open() + cmd.Start() for slave fd control.
Test passes 3x with -race. Original failure was load-dependent flake.

sequentialTasks.task: T004: Full make pass — all tests green
sequentialTasks.description: make make-all-with-log zero failures. All linters pass. Fixed bubbletea TestRunProgram_Lifecycle race.
go test -race -count=3 on critical packages. Full make passes.
Replaced dop251/goja_nodejs/eventloop with joeycumines/go-eventloop + goja-eventloop adapter. 5 production files, 9 test files. All platforms zero failures.
Rewrote grpc.go as thin wrapper around goja-grpc. Registered osm:protobuf. Extended EventLoopProvider. BREAKING: Promise-based streaming gRPC.
Browser Fetch API compliance. fetch() returns Promise<Response> with Headers, .text()/.json(). 38 tests pass with -race.

sequentialTasks.description: Signal option in fetch, applySignal(), pre-aborted/mid-request/timeout support. 3 tests. Docs updated.

Fixed 2 Windows failures. make-all-run-windows: zero failures.
deadcode linter zero issues.
betteralign zero issues.
Entries for T011-T013, T001, T002, T104, T105. Keep a Changelog 1.1.0 spec.

sequentialTasks.task: T178: Fix .DS_Store tracking and gitignore hygiene
sequentialTasks.description: Added .DS_Store to .gitignore. Added /.session-timer to .gitignore. Removed 4 .DS_Store files from git tracking via git rm --cached.
Recreated baseline.blueprint.json with osm-specific globalAlerts, mandatoryDirectives, continuousVerification, finalEnforcementProtocol. Empty sequentialTasks and blank statusSection per skill spec.

sequentialTasks.task: T017: Audit go-git v6 migration for sync
sequentialTasks.description: Audited: go-git v6 supports clone/add/commit/push (already native). Pull --rebase NOT supported by go-git. Created gitops.PullRebase() wrapper consolidating two shell-out sites (sync.go executePull, sync_startup.go SyncAutoPull) into single function with PullRebaseOptions struct and ErrConflict sentinel. 6 tests (success, already-up-to-date, conflict, invalid-dir, stderr-capture, custom-git-bin). Removed runGit method from sync.go. Cleaned imports.

sequentialTasks.task: T102: Security audit of scripting sandbox
sequentialTasks.description: Comprehensive security audit: (1) Runtime init — no ambient authority leaks. (2) require() traversal — module_hardening.go path escape prevention. (3) osm:exec — command injection vectors. (4) osm:fetch — SSRF (internal network, metadata endpoints). (5) osm:pty — spawn restrictions. (6) osm:os writeFile/appendFile — path restrictions. (7) Env var exposure — secret leakage. (8) MCP tool surface — privilege escalation. Review existing security_test.go, security_sandbox_test.go, security_input_test.go. Fix vulnerabilities. Regression tests. Update docs/security.md. Run make.

Run existing benchmarks (benchmark_test.go in internal/, config/, command/, scripting/). Analyze: engine startup, script throughput, ToTxtar, memory, MCP latency. benchstat comparison. Identify and optimize bottlenecks. Add benchmarks for fetch, grpc, session ID. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T106: Coverage report and gap analysis
sequentialTasks.description: Overall coverage: 87.3%. Key gaps: MCP Execute (20%), code_review Execute (46.9%), prompt_flow Execute (52.0%), config CheckSchemaVersion (0%), config ValidateOptionValue (0%), orchestrator module (67.4%), PTY wrapProcess (34%). Path to 90%: MCP + code_review + prompt_flow tests. Path to 95%: add all Tier 2 items (~15-20 test functions). Quick wins: config tests, PTY tests.

Integration tests for MCP server (internal/command/mcp.go). Full stdio transport: (1) JSON-RPC for all 8 tools (addFile, addDiff, addNote, removeFile, listContext, clearContext, buildPrompt, getGoals). (2) Success and error responses. (3) Concurrent tool calls. (4) Malformed input (invalid JSON-RPC, missing params, wrong types). (5) Large payloads. Run make.

Added 6 concurrency tests in internal/storage/filelock_concurrency_test.go: (1) ConcurrentAcquisition — 20 goroutines race for same lock, exactly 1 wins. (2) RapidCycling — 100 acquire/release cycles, no resource leaks. (3) CrashRecovery — fd close without release, re-acquire succeeds (flock release-on-close). (4) ConcurrentAcquireRelease — 10×20 contention loop under race detector. (5) AcquireLockHandle_ConcurrentAccess — public API, 20 goroutines. (6) FSBackend_ConcurrentOpen — concurrent backend creation. All pass with -race -count=3.

Added 8 edge case tests in internal/storage/cleanup_edge_test.go: (1) MaxCount=1 boundary — keep newest, remove 4. (2) All-zero policies — disabled = no cleaning. (3) ConcurrentCleaners — global lock serialization, race-safe. (4) LargeSessionSet — 200 sessions, age+count pruning. (5) CombinedPolicies — age+count union, 3 newest survive. (6) ZeroByteSessionFile — empty file handled without crash. (7) ExcludeNonExistentID — non-matching exclude is no-op. (8) ManyOrphanLocks — 20 orphan locks removed. All pass with -race.

Added 31 edge case tests in internal/config/schema_edge_test.go covering: out-of-range int values (overflow, MaxInt64, MinInt64, boundaries), special characters (tab, equals, colons, hash, emoji, CJK, mixed unicode), long values (10KB path list, 100-segment colon paths), non-UTF8/binary content (Latin-1, high bytes 0x80/0xFF), and parsing edge cases (CRLF, multiple spaces, leading/trailing whitespace, empty values, dotted keys, section names, comments, empty sections, back-to-back sections). Also includes duration boundary tests (0s, 1ns, 876000h, -5m, bare 0, bare number, empty string) and typed getter tests (GetInt boundaries, GetDuration large/zero). All pass with -race.

Expand fuzz tests beyond existing (config_fuzz_test.go, diff_splitter_fuzz_test.go, goja_fuzz_test.go). New targets: (1) Goal JSON loading. (2) Session ID sanitization. (3) ToTxtar generation. (4) Module path resolution. (5) MCP JSON-RPC parsing. Run -fuzztime=30s each. Fix panics. Run make.

Created newIsolatedGoalConfig() helper in goal_test_helpers_test.go. Fixed 4 tests in goal_registry_test.go, 5 subtests in builtin_edge_test.go, and 2 tests in goal_test.go to disable autodiscovery. Tightened assertions: GetAllGoals checks exactly 2 goals, EmptyGoalArray is a hard error. Added 3 cross-platform tests in goal_discovery_crossplatform_test.go (isolation, custom paths, path normalization). All tests pass with -race on macOS.

Enhance sync for common config: (1) Conflict handling — prompt override vs skip for unknown-state files. (2) Schema versioning in sync metadata. (3) Gitignored file handling. (4) Edge cases: empty repo, partial failure, concurrent sync. Run make.
Verify osm goal paths / osm script paths. Test: config key respect, symlink traversal, permission errors, performance with many paths, debug logging. Edge case tests. Run make.

Document require() algorithm (internal/scripting/module_hardening.go). Verify path traversal protection. Assess ESM feasibility in Goja. Document limitations. Verify script.module-paths config key. Run make.
Verify .prompt.md discovery via prompt.file-paths config. Test: goal references, VS Code conventions, composition, templating. Add missing tests. Update docs. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T014: Implement ReadableStream for Response.body streaming
sequentialTasks.description: Add ReadableStream to fetch Response.body. getReader() returns ReadableStreamDefaultReader. reader.read() returns Promise<{value: Uint8Array, done: boolean}>. Support: SSE, chunked encoding, large downloads without full buffering. Back-pressure via io.Reader goroutine pause. Tests with httptest. Integrate with fetch.go Response constructor. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T173: macOS process hierarchy fallback for session ID
sequentialTasks.description: macOS falls back to UUID when TERM_SESSION_ID unset. Implement Darwin Deep Anchor walk: (1) sysctl/libproc for process tree. (2) Skip ephemeral wrappers. (3) Shell boundaries (bash, zsh, fish). (4) Root boundaries (login, sshd, launchd). (5) Start time for PID recycling. (6) session_darwin.go with build tag. (7) Update session_other.go build tag. (8) Update doc. (9) Tests for persistence. Run make.

Add 3-5 built-in goals to goal_builtin.go. Review https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/resources/prompt-library/library for gaps. Each: stateVars, hotSnippets, flagDefs, promptOptions. Tests for metadata, state, commands, uniqueness, JSON roundtrip. Run make.

continuousVerification.task: Run 'make make-all-with-log' after EVERY significant change
continuousVerification.description: Execute after: (a) Each code change, (b) Each test addition, (c) Each task completion, (d) Each bug fix. Check build.log via 'make find-test-failures'.
continuousVerification.failPolicy: If ANY test fails, STOP IMMEDIATELY and fix before proceeding. Zero tolerance.
continuousVerification.testCoverage: Target 100% effective test coverage. VERIFY with go tool cover.
continuousVerification.crossPlatform: Periodically run make-all-in-container (Linux) and make-all-run-windows (Windows). All three platforms must pass.
